name: Woo Jinchul
title: Chief Inspector of the Korean Hunters Association Surveillance Team

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Fist of Justice
basic.description: Jinchul attacks by mixing jabs and hooks. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage.

core.name: Suppress
core.description: Jinchul charges and throws a straight right hand punch. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. Super Armor applied during use. When this skill hits, inflicts Stun effect on the target (Cooldown: 20 seconds, Duration: 3 seconds).

skill.name: Meditation of Power
skill.description: While ducking, Jinchul quickly approaches the enemy and throws a two-handed hook. After, he backs away with a quick backstep. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals weak Break damage. Grants Super Armor. Usable up to 2 times. When first hit lands, decreases cooldown of Iron Fist by 3 seconds. When used, grants Shield equal to 2% of Woo Jinchul's Defense to team members for 20 seconds (stacks up to 3 times).

skill.name: Iron Fist
skill.description: After performing a double jab with his left hand, he throws a powerful hook with his right hand. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. When used, charges Dash 1 time. Super Armor applied.

support.name: Justice Enforcement
support.description: After landing a quick two-handed hook, he throws a powerful straight punch. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. When used, increases max number of Dash instances by 2 and charges for 20 seconds.

qte.name: Judgement
qte.description: Jinchul approaches the enemy with a lightning-like weaving and performs a powerful uppercut. Deals Wind elemental damage. Deals medium Break damage. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, Stun, or Blind.

ultimate.name: Energy Field
ultimate.description: Jinchul performs an uppercut with all his heart. Deals Wind elemental damage.

passive.name: Dash Enhancement
passive.description: When the user uses Dash, increases the damage of Suppress, Meditation of Power, and Iron Fist by 30% for 6 seconds and grants them Super Armor. Decreases the cooldown of Dash by 1 second.

advancements: Meditation of Power Skill Effect Change: Increases Break effect and damage by 100%. Can be used up to 3 times.
The user's Defense Penetration increases by 10%.

When the user uses Dash, Extreme Evasion, or Judgement, it decreases the cooldown of Meditation of Power and Iron Fist by 2 seconds and activates the user's Core Attack. When Judgement is used, it activates Basic Passive and enhances the effect: damage increase enhances to 35%; duration increases to 7 seconds.
The user's Wind damage increases by 16%.
When the user uses their Basic Attack 4 times, it activates their Tier 3 Passive. When Meditation of Power is used, increases Defense by 5% (stacking up to 12 times).
